[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000011 2
3 011000111 5
4 000000011 2
5 100100010 3
6 011100100 4
7 010101101 5

01 10 101010000 3
12 21 110000001 3
23 32 100111111 7
34 43 111010100 5
45 54 000000000 a match 1
56 65 111100100 5
67 76 011000101 4
70 07 100011011 5

02 20 011010001 4
13 31 010111110 6

35 53 111010100 5

57 75 100100001 3
